product.description:
About Cloversoft:
Cloversoft key mission is to create only the safest and most eco-friendly products to the community where part of the sales proceed are donated to Polar Bears International to save our polar bears.

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua, Ethylhexyiglycerio (Vegetable Glycerin), Benzalkonium Chioride, Glycerin (Plant Derived), Triethyl Citrate (Food Grade), D-Panthenol (Plant Derived), Disodium Cocoamphodiacetate (Plant Derived), 1,3-Butylene Glycol (Plant Derived), Organic Aloe Barbadensis Extract & Chamomilla Recutita Extract
metaData.Key Information:
Cloversoft Pets Plant-Based Daily Pet Bathe Wipes!

Specially formulated for furry pets for safe & effective fur cleaning, Cloversoft Pets Plant-Based Daily Pet Bathe Wipes is perfect for Rinse-Free Showers after walks and to prevent flaky skin, matted fur and any dirt after a day of fun outdoors.

• 100% Unbleached Bamboo Pulp – Eco-friendly plant-based goodness for you, your furkid, and our earth
• 99.9% Antibacterial Efficacy – To keep your furkid germ-free and safe
• 50% More Organic Aloe Vera – To keep your furkid’s fur clean and comfy, free from dirt and grime
• 0% Parabens & Harsh Chemicals – Zero nasties for your peace of mind and for a happy healthy furkid!
• Vegan & Cruelty-Free – No animal testing or harmful substances!
• Suitable for All Fur & Skin Types – All-inclusive and perfect for furkids of all breeds and sizes!

Pack Size: 70 sheets per pack
Sheet Size: 200 x 200mm

Let Me Pamper Your Dog or Cat!
After an adventure with your furkid, wipe down your furkid from head to tail 2-3 tims with one wipe. Repeat this 2-3 more times for optimal cleaning of fur and skin. End off the session by cleaning your furkid’s paws, and enjoy a cuddle session with your clean & happy furkid.

metaData.Key Information: TAKI Chicken Breast is a lean, highly digestible protein, rich in B3, B6, phosphorus, and selenium—essential for muscle growth, bone strength, and immunity. B3 supports cholesterol regulation and joint health, B6 aids protein synthesis, phosphorus strengthens bones, and selenium provides antioxidant benefits. Freeze-dried to retain its full nutritional value, making it a wholesome, low-fat treat for your pet’s daily vitality.
metaData.Preparation: As food topper or treat. Feed directly or rehydrate with water before serving.

metaData.Key Information: TAKI Faroe Island Salmon is sourced from the pristine, cold waters of the Faroe Islands, known for its exceptional quality, rich flavor, and superior nutrition. Naturally high in omega-3 fatty acids and astaxanthin, it supports heart health, brain function, joint mobility, and overall vitality. With sustainable farming practices and high standards, this nutrient-dense, easily digestible protein is freeze-dried to preserve its essential benefits, making it a wholesome and flavorful treat for your furkid.

metaData.Preparation:
1. Fill litter tray with Catsan to a depth of 5-6cm
2. On coming into contact with liquid or animal waste, clay will form as well defined clumps
3. Remove the hard clumps
4. No need to discard the remaining sand just top up with fresh Catsan
